case_title: THU DO ET AL VS. 33 TEHAMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DO, THU O'BRIEN, MEGHAN AS TO DEFENDANT 33 TEHAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HEATHER PARKNILL, COMMUNITY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT 33 TEHAMA
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON 8-9-19 BY TELEPHONE. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED AS TO PLAINTIFF MEGHAN O'BRIEN.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF THU DO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MEGHAN O'BRIEN IS PRESENT BY COURTCALL APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT 33 TEHAMA, REPRESENTED BY STEPHANIE SWIFT, ASSISTANT MANAGER AND HEATHER PARKHILL, COMMUNITY MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2019 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT OWED TO THU DO AND MEGHAN O'BRIEN WAS PAID OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED ON 10/08/19. AS TO DEFENDANT 33 TEHAMA
